__instructions: Copy this file, rename it to your-scale-name.json, and fill in the fields. Delete all __note keys before saving.
__id_note: Must exactly match the filename without .json. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

name.en: Full Name of the Scale in English

__abbreviation_note: Short acronym used to refer to the scale. Leave empty string if none.

description.en: A brief description of what this scale measures, who it is for, and its main use cases.
description.tr: Bu ölçeğin ne ölçtüğüne, kime yönelik olduğuna ve temel kullanım alanlarına ilişkin kısa bir açıklama.

__item_count_note: Total number of items (questions) in the scale as an integer.
__subscales_note: Array of subscale names. Leave as empty array [] if the scale has no subscales.
__response_format_note: Describe the response options. E.g. '7-point Likert', 'Yes/No', 'Frequency scale (0-3)'.
__target_population_note: Who the scale is designed to be used with.
__languages_available_note: Array of ISO 639-1 language codes for available translations.

reliability.__cronbach_note: Overall Cronbach's alpha. Remove this comment key before saving.
reliability.__subscale_alpha_note: Alpha per subscale. Match names exactly to the subscales array. Remove this key.
reliability.__test_retest_note: Test-retest reliability if available. Leave empty string if not.

validity_notes.en: Brief description of validity evidence: factor structure, convergent/discriminant validity, etc.
validity_notes.tr: Geçerlilik kanıtlarının kısa açıklaması: faktör yapısı, yakınsak/ayrışan geçerlilik vb.

downloads.__form_note: PDF of the scale form participants fill out. Remove this key.
downloads.__scoring_note: PDF scoring/interpretation guide for researchers. Remove this key.
downloads.__manual_note: Full technical manual PDF. Leave empty string if not available. Remove this key.

citation.en: Lastname, F. (2024). Full scale name [Scale name in brackets]. Journal Name, 10(2), 1-20. https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxx
citation.tr: Soyadı, A. (2024). Ölçeğin tam adı [Köşeli parantez içinde kısa ad]. Dergi Adı, 10(2), 1-20. https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxx

__citation_note: APA-format citation for how others should cite this scale.
__reference_publication_note: The id field of the publication JSON where this scale was originally published/validated. Leave empty string if not in your publications list.
__featured_note: Set to true to highlight this scale at the top of the scales page.
